system.powerDescription:
The world bent with a flick of the rest. You restructure reality in a CAT area around a point in range. Pick any of the following effects: 

• Change the direction of gravity. 
• Cause mundane objects with a total size of up to CAT-1 to disappear. 
• Alter the local time of day in the area, mundane humans will not question this change. 
• Illuminate the area with a holy glow. 
• Repair any broken object/structures to their original state. 

For each choice, the Admin rolls 1d6. If they roll at least one ‘1’ the Admin gains one use of this power against you at your current CAT and can activate it any time. Gain or grant +1D any time you or an ally take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll whilst active.
